_legend.season: Label shown on the card. Examples: 'Spring Season', 'Lawn Season', 'Snow Season', 'Off Season'
_legend.today_area: City you are working in today. Examples: 'St. Catharines', 'Niagara-on-the-Lake', 'Welland'
_legend.last_updated: Date shown on the card. Update this whenever you change the file. Format: 'April 5, 2026'
_legend.alert: Storm or urgent alert banner. Leave empty '' to hide it. Example: 'Storm Watch Tonight'

service_states.active: Service is running now — shows gold bar
service_states.upcoming: Service starts soon — shows grey bar, says 'Starting Soon'
service_states.standby: Service is on call / weather dependent — shows grey bar, says 'On Call'
service_states.done: Season is over — shows green bar, says 'Season Over'
